TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: KA tou lalat si-augh ki wæ'i ki pæ'ihababan rou mi-næu-namou bavaragh, dou naunamou-al-ato (ta wai) ki kpta, ni-ierroua ta ti Maria Magdalena, ti Maria-appa ka saat tou ararau-eih nein ta ravak.
KA tou lalat siaugh ki wæ'i ki pæ'ihababan rou minæunamou bavaragh, dou naunamoualato (ta wai) ki kpta, niierroua ta ti Maria Magdalena, ti Mariaappa ka saat tou araraueih nein ta ravak.
S.TRANSL: Ende late (nae) den Sabbath als het begon te lichten teghen den cersten (dagh) der weke quam Maria Magdalena ennde de andere Maria om het graf te besien,
In the end of the sabbath, as it began to dawn toward the first day of the week, came Mary Magdalene and the other Mary to see the sepulchre.
安息日將盡，七日的頭一日，天快亮的時候，抹大拉的馬利亞和那個馬利亞來看墳墓。

S.FORM: Ka k'ytt'ei, ni-ierroua ta nynnugh ka irang: då Tama-Gnau ki Meirang ka mou-rarim makka-tounnoun, ta ni-ierroua, ka ni rihkyllen tyn ta vahto poutauagh ki ngatas, ka ni-mierroung ta teni mi-hælæp ki anna.
Ka k'ytt'ei, niierroua ta nynnugh ka irang: då TamaGnau ki Meirang ka mourarim makkatounnoun, ta niierroua, ka ni rihkyllen tyn ta vahto poutauagh ki ngatas, ka nimierroung ta teni mihælæp ki anna.
S.TRANSL: Endesiet datr ghefchiedde een groote aeedtbebinge : want een Engel des Heeren neder dalende upt den Hemel quam toe mde wentelde den fteen af ban ds deure ende sat op den selben,
And, behold, there was a great earthquake: for the angel of the Lord descended from heaven, and came and rolled back the stone from the door, and sat upon it.
忽然，地大震動；因為有主的使者從天上下來，把石頭滾開，坐在上面。

S.FORM: Ka hauwei tyn ta mahkæula ki rykkat, ka pammammien tyn ta mapoule mama ki eu'la ka ma-paroukapok.
Ka hauwei tyn ta mahkæula ki rykkat, ka pammammien tyn ta mapoule mama ki eu'la ka maparoukapok.
S.TRANSL: Ende lijne gedaente was ghelyck een blirem ende ijne kleedinghe wit geliick meeuw.
His countenance was like lightning, and his raiment white as snow:
他的相貌如同閃電，衣服潔白如雪。

S.FORM: Ka alei ki tahkot tyni-æn, ni-mæuævæuvæuh ta kmakading, ka mama ki patei ta neni.
Ka alei ki tahkot tyniæn, nimæuævæuvæuh ta kmakading, ka mama ki patei ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Ende uyt breese ban Hem zijn de wachters seer berschaickt gheworden ende wierden als doode,
And for fear of him the keepers did shake, and became as dead men.
看守的人就因他嚇得渾身亂戰，甚至和死人一樣。

S.FORM: Râ dou mattæ'i v'lli ta Ta-ma-Gnæu ni-k'ma ki jnejna, yona mahtakout ta ymoumi, ka kavana-'en-au ka kmi-ym-kamou ti Jesus-an ka nipounavæværæh-in-ato.
Râ dou mattæ'i v'lli ta TamaGnæu nik'ma ki jnejna, yona mahtakout ta ymoumi, ka kavana'enau ka kmiymkamou ti Jesusan ka nipounavæværæhinato.
S.TRANSL: Mae de Engel antwoordende (eyde tot de brouwen En breeft ghy-lieden niet : want ick weet dat ghy soeckt Jesum die ghekmycight was. —
And the angel answered and said unto the women, Fear not ye: for I know that ye seek Jesus, which was crucified.
天使對婦女說：＂不要害怕！我知道你們是尋找那釘十字架的耶穌。

S.FORM: Aousi ta teni hia: ni-pati-mæu-ähän ta teni (pa-ahpit)ma-ma ki na sou tyn. Mou-koua hia, k'ytt'i ta yttou-koua-an ki ni-ka-lalikou-en ki Meirang.
Aousi ta teni hia: nipatimæuähän ta teni (paahpit)mama ki na sou tyn. Moukoua hia, k'ytt'i ta yttoukouaan ki nikalalikouen ki Meirang.
S.TRANSL: Hy en 18 hier niet: want hy is opgeltaen gelyck hy geseght heekt. Hot erheywaerts siet de plaetse daer de Heere gelegen heeft.
He is not here: for he is risen, as he said. Come, see the place where the Lord lay.
他不在這裏，照他所說的，已經復活了。你們來看安放主的地方。

S.FORM: Ka ou-koua madys vanava na ki Pahtatæutæuughan tyn, ka vi-pætimæu-ahan pa-ahpit ki ni-kapatei-an: ka k'ytt'ei, siourourou ta teni ymoumi-æn mou-koua tou Galilea, tou hyana k'ytt'ei-moumi ta teni. K'ytt'ei, pattæ'i-kahan-at-'mæu ymoumi-æn.

Ka oukoua madys vanava na ki Pahtatæutæuughan tyn, ka vipætimæuahan paahpit ki nikapateian: ka k'ytt'ei, siourourou ta teni ymoumiæn moukoua tou Galilea, tou hyana k'ytt'eimoumi ta teni. K'ytt'ei, pattæ'ikahanat'mæu ymoumiæn.
S.TRANSL: Ende gaet haestelick henen ende segget stjneDiscipelen dat hy opghestaen 1s ban den dooden: ende siet Hy gaet u boor naGalileen daer sult ghy hem fien. Siet ies hobbe het ulieden gheeght.
And go quickly, and tell his disciples that he is risen from the dead; and, behold, he goeth before you into Galilee; there shall ye see him: lo, I have told you.
快去告訴他的門徒，說他從死裏復活了，並且在你們以先往加利利去，在那裏你們要見他。看哪，我已經告訴你們了。＂

S.FORM: Jrou ka madys t'papænæh-hen nein ki ravak tou kahtakout-tan ki karæi-en-appa ka irang, ni-sioum ta neni alei ki hnau-en (ki atta) ki Pahtatæutæuughan tyn.
Jrou ka madys t'papænæhhen nein ki ravak tou kahtakouttan ki karæienappa ka irang, nisioum ta neni alei ki hnauen (ki atta) ki Pahtatæutæuughan tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende haeltelick uptgaende ban het graf met breefe ende groote blijdtfchap liepen sy henen om (het selbe ) fijnen Ditcipelen te boodtichappen.
And they departed quickly from the sepulchre with fear and great joy; and did run to bring his disciples word.
婦女們就急忙離開墳墓，又害怕，又大大地歡喜，跑去要報給他的門徒。

S.FORM: Jrou ka d'marang ta neni alei ki hnæu-en ki Pahtatautauughan tyn, Kytt'ei ni-muakla neini-æn ta ti Jesus, k'ma, Tabe, (marai-ato:) jrou ka mou-koua ta neni, ni-pei-koua-an nein ta rahpæl tyn, makou-Alilid tyni-en.

Jrou ka d'marang ta neni alei ki hnæuen ki Pahtatautauughan tyn, Kytt'ei nimuakla neiniæn ta ti Jesus, k'ma, Tabe, (maraiato:) jrou ka moukoua ta neni, nipeikouaan nein ta rahpæl tyn, makouAlilid tynien.
S.TRANSL: Ende als sy henen ginghen om syne Dilcipelen te boodtichappen Siet Jesus ts haer ontmoet egghende Weelt gegroet : ende ly tot (hem) komende greptn stjne boeten ende aenbaden hem.
And as they went to tell his disciples, behold, Jesus met them, saying, All hail. And they came and held him by the feet, and worshipped him.
忽然，耶穌遇見她們，說：＂願你們平安！＂她們就上前抱住他的腳拜他。

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Ynna mahtakout, ou-koua-ato hnau ki tæ'i-apapara-au ka sahkakou-'ei nein mou-koua Galilen, ka tou hynna kmytta-ah ta neni jau-an.
Anna ta nik'ma ta ti Jesus tyniæn, Ynna mahtakout, oukouaato hnau ki tæ'iapaparaau ka sahkakou'ei nein moukoua Galilen, ka tou hynna kmyttaah ta neni jauan.
S.TRANSL: Boe leyde Jesus tot haer En breest niet gaet henen boodtschapper mijnen broederen dat sy henen gaen nae Galileen ende alDae? sullen sy my fien.
Then said Jesus unto them, Be not afraid: go tell my brethren that they go into Galilee, and there shall they see me.
耶穌對她們說：＂不要害怕！你們去告訴我的弟兄，叫他們往加利利去，在那裏必見我。＂

S.FORM: Jrou ka dimarang ta neni, k'ytt'ei ta rouma ki kmakading ni mau-æuma ta neni, ka ni-ymd-den nein hnau ki Tama-P'hik ka sibavau ta kamamang ka ni-pam't-en atou-râ.
Jrou ka dimarang ta neni, k'ytt'ei ta rouma ki kmakading ni mauæuma ta neni, ka niymdden nein hnau ki TamaP'hik ka sibavau ta kamamang ka nipam'ten atourâ.
S.TRANSL: Ende als sy henen gingen siet eenighe ban de warcht quamen in de ltadt ende boodtschapten den Oberpatelters alle de dingen die geschiedt waren,
Now when they were going, behold, some of the watch came into the city, and shewed unto the chief priests all the things that were done.
她們去的時候，看守的兵有幾個進城去，將所經歷的事都報給祭司長。

S.FORM: Jrou ka mæu'i sal-ato ki Mamoumou, ka ni-ki'ym-en nein ta sou, ni-pa -tapang-en nein ta malyttouk ki voual ka tama-ma-cyt,
Jrou ka mæu'i salato ki Mamoumou, ka niki'ymen nein ta sou, nipa tapangen nein ta malyttouk ki voual ka tamamacyt,
S.TRANSL: Ende sy bergadert rijade met de Ondellingen mdet samen raedt genomen. hebbende | gaben sy den jge knechten beel geldts
And when they were assembled with the elders, and had taken counsel, they gave large money unto the soldiers,
祭司長和長老聚集商議，就拿許多銀錢給兵丁，說：

S.FORM: Kma, Mattæ i-komma hynna ki sou ta ymoumi, ka ni ierroua ka euvanan ta Pahtatæu-tæuughan tyn, ka ni-haouzoung tyni-æn tou ierppa'ni-an.
Kma, Mattæ ikomma hynna ki sou ta ymoumi, ka ni ierroua ka euvanan ta Pahtatæutæuughan tyn, ka nihaouzoung tyniæn tou ierppa'nian.
S.TRANSL: Ende sepden Segget Sijne Ditcipelen 3Hn : des nachts-ghekomen ende Prepen, hem geftolen als wy
Saying, Say ye, His disciples came by night, and stole him away while we slept.
＂你們要這樣說：＂夜間我們睡覺的時候，他的門徒來，把他偷去了。＂

S.FORM: Heirou ka illinghei ki Tai-sou ki pourough ta anna, dmaoudalo-ah-kame tyni-æn, ka aousi-æh-kamou ki hymko ta ymoumi.
Heirou ka illinghei ki Taisou ki pourough ta anna, dmaoudaloahkame tyniæn, ka aousiæhkamou ki hymko ta ymoumi.
S.TRANSL: Ende indien sulcks komt gehoort te worden ban den Stadt-houder wp full? hem te breden ftellen efi maen dat gy londe forge zijt.
And if this come to the governor's ears, we will persuade him, and secure you.
倘若這話被巡撫聽見，有我們勸他，保你們無事。＂

S.FORM: Jrou ka ni-ara nein ta ma-lyttouk, ni-pamut mama ki ni-pahtæutæu-hen neini-æn. Ka ni-hmavei-ah ta sou k'anna tou ta-maug ki Joden tou kidi-appa ki wai katta hnyn.
Jrou ka niara nein ta malyttouk, nipamut mama ki nipahtæutæuhen neiniæn. Ka nihmaveiah ta sou k'anna tou tamaug ki Joden tou kidiappa ki wai katta hnyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende ly het geldt genomen hebbende deden gelick sy geleert waren. Ende dit woort is berbrepdt gheworden bp de Jodn tot op den huydigen dagth.
So they took the money, and did as they were taught: and this saying is commonly reported among the Jews until this day.
兵丁受了銀錢，就照所囑咐他們的去行。這話就傳說在猶太人中間，直到今日。 （可16‧14－18；路24‧36－49；約20‧19－23；徒1‧6－8）

S.FORM: Râ sat kytti-æn 'æb ki sat ki Pahtatæutæuughan ni-thabul mou-koua tou Galilea, tou vouk-kyn ka ni-si-kidi-en ti Jesus neini-æn.
Râ sat kyttiæn 'æb ki sat ki Pahtatæutæuughan nithabul moukoua tou Galilea, tou voukkyn ka nisikidien ti Jesus neiniæn.
S.TRANSL: Ende br "ir Discipelen 3yn henen ghegaen nae Galtiren) nae den bergh daer Jesus haer beschepden hadde
Then the eleven disciples went away into Galilee, into a mountain where Jesus had appointed them.
十一個門徒往加利利去，到了耶穌約定的山上。

S.FORM: Jrou ka kmytta tyni-æn, ni-mako-Alilid tyni-æn ta neni, rå vi-pæg-dalah-appa ki rÿh ta rou-ma-râ.
Jrou ka kmytta tyniæn, nimakoAlilid tyniæn ta neni, rå vipægdalahappa ki rÿh ta roumarâ.
S.TRANSL: Ende als sy hem sagen baden sy hem aen doch fommighe twijfelden.
And when they saw him, they worshipped him: but some doubted.
他們見了耶穌就拜他，然而還有人疑惑。

S.FORM: Jrou ka mou-koua mou-hylli ta ti Jesus, ni-pasousou-en tyn neini-æn, k'ma, Ni-p'hæn-koh ymmid ki kailhgen tou tounnoun ki vullum ki Næi.
Jrou ka moukoua mouhylli ta ti Jesus, nipasousouen tyn neiniæn, k'ma, Nip'hænkoh ymmid ki kailhgen tou tounnoun ki vullum ki Næi.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus by haer komende (prack tot haer seggende My is gegeben alle macht in Hemel ende op aerden.
And Jesus came and spake unto them, saying, All power is given unto me in heaven and in earth.
耶穌進前來，對他們說：＂天上地下所有的權柄都賜給我了。

S.FORM: Anna ta mou-kou-â,mahko-veiagh mahtautæuugh ki ta'u-taou, mæulough neinian tou Næ-nang ki Rama, ki Alak, ki Joep-pan ka d'lligh matiktik: pahtau tæuugh-ei-moumi pa-illigh neini-æn ymmid ki mamang ka ni-pæh-kou-sou-en-nau ymoumi-æn.

Anna ta moukouâ,mahkoveiagh mahtautæuugh ki ta'utaou, mæulough neinian tou Nænang ki Rama, ki Alak, ki Joeppan ka d'lligh matiktik: pahtau tæuugheimoumi pailligh neiniæn ymmid ki mamang ka nipæhkousouennau ymoumiæn.
S.TRANSL: Gaetdanhenen onderwhlt alle de bolckeren deselbe doopende in den Name des Daderrs ende des Soons ende des Hepligen Geelts : leerende haer onderhouden alles wat ick u geoden hebbe,
Go ye therefore, and teach all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father, and of the Son, and of the Holy Ghost:
所以，你們要去，使萬民作我的門徒，奉父、子、聖靈的名給他們施洗 。

S.FORM: Ka k'yttei, æ'ia-lam-koh ymoumi-æn tou ymmid ki wæ'i, tou kidi ki lymmon-lymmou ki yddarynnoughan, Amen.
Ka k'yttei, æ'ialamkoh ymoumiæn tou ymmid ki wæ'i, tou kidi ki lymmonlymmou ki yddarynnoughan, Amen.
S.TRANSL: Ende iet ick ben met dilieden alle de dagen tot de boleyndinghe der werek.
Teaching them to observe all things whatsoever I have commanded you: and, lo, I am with you alway, even unto the end of the world. Amen.
凡我所吩咐你們的，都教訓他們遵守，我就常與你們同在，直到世界的末了。＂
